forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny day. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west at night. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 29 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of morning fog west of Nullarbor. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 29 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 31.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
